---
title: "„Historische“ Königsinschrift"
---
```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button onclick="setZoom(0.9)">A−</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1)">A</button>
  <button onclick="setZoom(1.2)">A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', scale);
  localStorage.setItem('site-zoom', scale);
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('site-zoom');
  if (saved) {
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--base-scale', saved);
  }
});
</script>
```

[Datum](../slots/datum.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-datum} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0001_xr Hm n_01.png){.glyph} *ḫr ḥm n* [König](../slots/koenig.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-k-nig} <b>[narrativer Text]</b>   




## Übersetzung

[Datum](../slots/datum.qmd){.slot-link .slot-datum} unter der Majestät / Regierung des [König](../slots/koenig.qmd){.slot-link .slot-k-nig}s

## Kommentar

nach *ḫr ḥm n*: Thronname des Königs

## Schreibvarianten

::: {.glyphvariants-block}

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*[ḫr] ḥm n*</em>:</span><span class='tla-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/400036' class='tla-badge' title='TLA-Lemma 400036' aria-label='Lemma 400036 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>TLA 400036</a><span class='tla-separator' aria-hidden='true'> / </span><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/104690' class='tla-badge' title='TLA-Lemma 104690' aria-label='Lemma 104690 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>TLA 104690</a></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0001_xr Hm n_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0010_xr Hm n_02.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0020_Hm n_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0030_Hm n_02.png){.glyph}

- <span class='glyphvariant-heading'><span class='glyphvariant-term'><em>*nsw bit*</em>:</span><span class='tla-badges'><a href='https://thesaurus-linguae-aegyptiae.de/lemma/88060' class='tla-badge' title='TLA-Lemma 88060' aria-label='Lemma 88060 im Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae öffnen'>TLA 88060</a></span></span>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0001_nsw-bit_01.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0010_nsw-bit_02.png){.glyph}

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0020_nsw-bit_NR_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0030_nsw-bit_NR_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0040_nsw-bit_NR_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0050_nsw-bit_NR_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(NR)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0060_nsw-bit_Gr_01.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0070_nsw-bit_Gr_02.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0080_nsw-bit_Gr_03.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>

     - ![](/assets/glyphs500px/02_Slots/Koenig/04_Thronname_01/0090_nsw-bit_Gr_04.png){.glyph} <sup>(Gr.)</sup>


:::





```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  let lastScrollY = window.scrollY;
  const footer = document.getElementById("footer-nav");

  function onScroll() {
    const currentScrollY = window.scrollY;

    if (currentScrollY > lastScrollY && currentScrollY > 80) {
      footer.classList.add("footer-hidden");
    } else {
      footer.classList.remove("footer-hidden");
    }

    lastScrollY = currentScrollY;
  }

  window.addEventListener("scroll", onScroll, { passive: true });
})();
</script>
```
